title: Batch actions limited to 500
excerpt: It would be nice if we could move and/or action over 500 items at a time.  Is there a reason that batch actions are limited to 500?  It seems like a pretty major flaw to me, as I assume many other people also want the ab…

posts.author: zwalters (Zac Walters)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice if we could move and/or action over 500 items at a time. Is there a reason that batch actions are limited to 500? It seems like a pretty major flaw to me, as I assume many other people also want the ability to move large groups of contacts/items from one board to another, without repeating the same steps several times to complete the task.
